ddls:
CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the artist */,
  "artist_name" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "external_urls" TEXT /* External URLs associated with the artist (e.g., Spotify profile) */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Array of genres associated with the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the artist */,
  "followers_count" INTEGER /* Number of followers the artist has */,
  "popularity" INTEGER /* Popularity score of the artist (out of 100) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the artist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the artist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the album */,
  "artist_id" TEXT /* Reference to the artist who created the album */,
  "album_name" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "album_type" TEXT /* Type of the album (e.g., album, single) */,
  "album_release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "album_release_year" INTEGER /* Year the album was released */,
  "album_release_date_precision" TEXT /* Precision of the release date (e.g., day, month, year) */,
  "total_tracks" INTEGER /* Total number of tracks on the album */,
  "label" TEXT /* Label of the album */,
  "copyrights" TEXT /* Copyrights information for the album */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the album was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the album was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the track */,
  "album_id" TEXT /* Reference to the album the track belongs to */,
  "track_name" TEXT /* Name of the track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number on the album */,
  "disc_number" INTEGER /* Disc number on the album */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track is explicit */,
  "track_href" TEXT /* Track href for API access */,
  "analysis_url" TEXT /* URL for audio analysis */,
  "track_preview_url" TEXT /* URL for a 30-second preview of the track */,
  "track_uri" TEXT /* Unique URI for the track */,
  "is_local" INTEGER /* Indicates if the track is local (not from Spotify) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the track was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the track was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy level of the track */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track in decibels */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track (0 for minor, 1 for major) */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track in BPM */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the track */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the audio features were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the audio features were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_modes" (
  "key_name" TEXT /* Name of the key (e.g., C#, G) */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the mode (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "key_mode" TEXT /* Combined key and mode (e.g., C# minor, G major) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("key_name", "mode_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Reference to the track the user interacted with */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who interacted with the track */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., play, like, share) */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the interaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the interaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the interaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_track_id FOREIGN KEY ("track_id") REFERENCES tracks ("track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, content manager) */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the playlist */,
  "playlist_name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user who created the playlist */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the playlist was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_tracks" (
  "playlist_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the playlist */,
  "track_id" TEXT /* Reference to the track in the playlist */,
  "added_at" TEXT /* Date the track was added to the playlist */,
  "added_by" TEXT /* Reference to the user who added the track to the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "track_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "track_versions" (
  "track_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the track */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the track */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the track version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date the track version was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "version")
)
